nodes.label: hstui (hyprsunset TUI)
nodes.rationale: Terminal UI for managing hyprsunset on Hyprland. Goal: make hyprsunset feel like a controllable desktop utility while fitting naturally into keyboard-driven Hyprland workflows. Targets users who want quick manual control, reusable profiles, and a simple TUI without a full graphical settings app.

nodes.label: Bubble Tea framework
nodes.rationale: TUI built on Bubble Tea (Model/Update pattern). Other TUI approaches were prototyped on tui/* branches before settling on Bubble Tea.

nodes.label: hyprsunset profiles
nodes.rationale: Profiles store temperature, gamma, and other fields written to ~/.config/hypr/hyprsunset.conf; the running daemon reads the config and applies the profile matching the current time.

nodes.label: Daemon control via uwsm/pgrep/pkill
nodes.rationale: Enabled checkbox launches hyprsunset through 'uwsm app' and stops it by terminating the hyprsunset process; runtime state checked via pgrep and killed via pkill.

nodes.label: golangci-lint v2 config
nodes.rationale: golangci-lint v2 config. Enables revive (idiomatic-Go style: exported docs, naming) and misspell on top of defaults (errcheck, govet, ineffassign, staticcheck, unused); enables gofmt formatter.
